last_episode_to_air.name: Horns Up
last_episode_to_air.overview: A prank gets out of hand when fraternity brothers get a goat in their house and Billy is tasked with removing it. Later: Billy faces flying squirrels that have invaded a family's attic.

name: Billy the Exterminator
overview: Follow Billy Bretherton and his family of exterminators as they attempt to balance life at home with the drama of running one of the busiest pest removal companies in Louisiana. From colonies of ants to giant snakes, snapping alligators to roach infestations, pest removal is big business, and in the swamps of Louisiana, Billy the Exterminator has seen it all.

episodes.name: Snake in the Closet.
episodes.overview: A sports stadium with a bat problem is tackled. Also: a vacant house filled with mice and an enormous snake.

episodes.name: There's a Gator in My Boat
episodes.overview: Billy travels to a farm to snag an alligator, which ends up taking a bite out of him. Later, Billy and Rick tackle a swarm of wasps at a home.

episodes.name: Possums in the Wall
episodes.overview: Billy battles termites in a house that is going up for sale. Later, he travels to a home where a family of possums are living in the walls.

episodes.name: Llama-Eating Gators
episodes.overview: Billy goes after an alligator who poses a threat to pet llamas on a ranch.

episodes.name: Psycho Racoon / Killer Spiders
episodes.overview: An unidentified creature is living in the walls of a home; and black widows infest a family's house.

episodes.name: Racoon Hunting
episodes.overview: A raccoon problem at a plantation leads to the discovery of an enormous mound of raccoon excrement in an attic. Also: a wasp infestation in the home of a deaf couple.

episodes.name: Skunks and Mice and Snakes Oh My
Funeral Home Snake
episodes.overview: The dead aren't resting peacefully at this funeral home because a rattlesnake is loose in the crematorium. Billy and Ricky search for the snake, but it finds them first--and it's a mean one! Later, Billy heads into a treacherous attic to deal with some bats, knowing that one false step could send him plunging through the floor.

episodes.name: Attack of the Trash Can Raccoon
episodes.overview: It's Billy vs. the Raccoon when the feisty animal gets trapped in a dumpster--and Billy knows it won't give up without a big fight. Later, Billy's got another tough battle on his hands when he comes up against some Cicada Killer Wasps with their very painful stingers.

episodes.name: Snake Invader
episodes.overview: Armadillos, and snakes, and roaches, oh, my. When Billy and Ricky get a call about an armadillo terrorizing a woman's garden, they arrive to discover that a poisonous snake may be on the loose, too. Later, Billy confronts one of the biggest roach infestations of his career in the home of a client with severe health issues. Meanwhile, back at the office, Mary's trying to give orders--and she doesn't even work there!

episodes.name: Raccoon Rescue
episodes.overview: The crew must help a raccoon that's stuck in a tree with a peanut-butter jar on its head; and Billy climbs a theater catwalk to capture pigeons with his bare hands.

episodes.name: Spider Invasion
episodes.overview: Billy hunts for a nutria in his mother's neighbor's yard; and Billy and Ricky tackle a cabin full of poisonous brown recluse spiders.

episodes.name: Squirrels in the Attic
episodes.overview: Billy and Rick handle a wasp infestation; and Billy tries to catch a squirrel in an attic and discovers a fire hazard.

episodes.name: Squirrel Gone Wild
episodes.overview: Billy retrieves a dead animal beneath a home; and Billy and Rick try to catch a squirrel that's loose in a house.

episodes.name: Sprayed by a Skunk!
episodes.overview: Billy hunts an alligator living in a pond at a golf club; and tries to catch a skunk that's a threat to a couple's young daughter.

episodes.name: Python on the Prowl
episodes.overview: Billy and Rick deal with a yellow jacket nest that's five times the size of a normal nest; and Billy must get a rid of a python living in a home.

episodes.name: Billy Goes to the Gulf
episodes.overview: In this special one-hour episode, Billy and his brother Ricky travel to the Gulf Coast and find themselves head-to-head with the devastation caused by the Deepwater Horizon oil spill. Along the way they battle a pair of foxes, help a local charity deal with a massive roach infestation, and witness first-hand the effects the oil is having on wildlife.

episodes.name: Coffin of Deadly Reptiles
episodes.overview: In the third-season opener, the brothers remove an alligator stuck in a duck blind with two venomous snakes, as well as crayfish and roaches.

episodes.name: Fox Fight!
episodes.overview: Billy searches for a fox that poses a threat to a mother and her child;  and a swarm of yellow jackets have left a family's bathroom unusable.

episodes.name: Snakes in a Pool
episodes.overview: Billy tries to catch snakes at the bottom of a pool that's nearly empty and very slippery; and helps a rancher who's battling a beaver.

episodes.name: Bees from Hell
episodes.overview: Billy and Ricky battle a swarm of bees at a Baptist church; and Billy encounters an animal he's never dealt with before.

episodes.name: Five Alarm Hive
episodes.overview: Billy and Ricky rescue firefighter trainees from bees swarming a fire-department training center.

episodes.name: Raccoon Rampage
episodes.overview: Billy and Ricky battle raccoons that are stealing expensive kangaroo food at a petting zoo; and Billy tackles a roach infestation.

episodes.name: Monster Mice
episodes.overview: Billy is attacked by wasps; and Billy and Ricky help a single mother who has a mouse problem.

episodes.name: Hogs Gone Wild!
episodes.overview: The men battle feral hogs, and experts are called in to help; and Billy and Ricky rescue an injured baby bunny.

episodes.name: Canine Cage Match
episodes.overview: A new mother calls Billy after a wild canine snatches her dog and is hunting her other pets. When Billy's trap is too small for the job, he suits up and throws down in a no holds barred cage match with one of the North's most feared predators. Early spring brings a baby boom, as critters get busy in attics and garages. Billy then teams up with trapper Ben for a dawn to dusk eviction of ferocious squatters who won't go without a fight.

episodes.name: Henhouse of Horrors
episodes.overview: Billy stakes out a northern farm where a predator is creating a horror show at a chicken coop. Later: he goes north to help remove a group of beavers who dammed up a creek and washed out the local road.

episodes.name: Snakes on a Boat
episodes.overview: Billy heads to cottage country where a houseboat rental company finds a nest of snakes inside one of their boats. Billy and his exterminator partner Derick jump into the serpent moshpit and attempt to break up the slithering party.

episodes.name: Paranormal Extermination
episodes.overview: Billy responds to a construction site where a vicious varmint has the tradespeople running scared. He tries to outsmart the beast, and takes some brutal bites in the process. And strange paranormal activity jeopardizes the sale of a country home, so Billy enlists his reluctant dispatcher Bea to investigate. They go in prepared for a ghost hunt, and get more than they bargained for.

episodes.name: Wild Wedding Party
episodes.overview: With a gang of wild turkeys tearing apart a country wedding venue, a stressed-out wedding planner calls on Billy to puts the bride's big day back on track. But the birds prove to be more agile than anticipated. What ensues is a comedy of errors as Billy and his partner, Terry, try to put this poultry in its place! Then a trio of Vietnamese Centipedes with a nasty nature and a serious bite is on the loose in a basement apartment! Billy puts himself in the line of fire to keep a family safe.

episodes.name: Sting Operation
episodes.overview: Billy gets a call from a terrified family with three young children. There's a honey bee nest inside their house! Billy calls on his buddy Ian, a local beekeeper, to help him move the angry bees to a happy place, but the colony doesn't go quietly. Billy suffers a few stings while struggling to get the upper hand. Then Billy has to dodge talons and beak to hand-catch a Great Horned Owl that's stuck in a family's rural home.

episodes.name: Reptile Rampage
episodes.overview: Billy gets called to a quiet suburban neighborhood where an unassuming home has been converted into a reptile rooming house. The dangerous rescue mission requires Billy to wrestle crocs, serpents and lizards and hand them over to a sanctuary. Then, further up north, Billy gets help from local trapper, Mike, to take charge of a couple of prickly porcupine cottage-squatters that need to get gone!

episodes.name: I Smell a Rat Infestation
episodes.overview: Billy is asked to round up a group of ostriches that escaped from a farm. Also: first-time house flippers call on Billy to eradicate a severe rat infestation in their home.

episodes.name: Later, Alligator
episodes.overview: A reptile invades a nature lover's pool and Billy is called in to try and remove it. Later: he tackles an apartment home infested with bedbugs.

episodes.name: Magic Show Mayhem
episodes.overview: Billy helps a magician after his animals run amok during a show at a retirement home. Later: he visits a maple syrup-maker who is plagued by a skunk.

episodes.name: Horns Up
episodes.overview: A prank gets out of hand when fraternity brothers get a goat in their house and Billy is tasked with removing it. Later: Billy faces flying squirrels that have invaded a family's attic.
